display_text: Death Prophet Aghanim's Scepter: Exorcism now spawns additional ghosts when attacking or casting spells on enemies, increasing damage output and sustain. This upgrade counters high-mobility and evasion heroes by ensuring continuous ghost attacks that return health, making Death Prophet harder to burst down in fights.
search_text: Death Prophet Aghanim Scepter Exorcism sustain damage anti-evasion high-mobility ghost attacks lifesteal

display_text: Death Prophet Aghanim's Shard: Spirit Siphon gains an extra charge and fears enemies after 3 seconds of continuous siphon. This upgrade counters aggressive melee heroes and divers by disrupting their positioning and forcing retreats, enhancing Death Prophet's survivability and control in chaotic fights.
search_text: Death Prophet Aghanim Shard Spirit Siphon fear anti-dive crowd control positioning disruption survivability
